 def home(request):
-    food_items = FoodItem.objects.all()

 def create_spot(request):
-    food_items = FoodItemForm()
+    spots_form = SpotsForm()
     if request.method == 'POST':
-        food_item = FoodItemForm(request.POST , request.FILES)
-        if food_item.is_valid():
-            food_item.save()
+        spots_form = SpotsForm(request.POST , request.FILES)
+        if spots_form.is_valid():
+            spots_form.save()
             return redirect('home')
-    return render(request, 'food/food_form.html', {"food_items":food_items})
+    return render(request, 'spots/spots_form.html', {"spots_form":spots_form})
 
 
 def update_spot(request , pk):
-    food = FoodItem.objects.get(id=pk)
-    food_items = FoodItemForm(instance=food)
+    spots = Spots.objects.get(id=pk)
+    spots_form = SpotsForm(instance=spots)

+        spots.delete()
         return redirect('home')
-    return render(request, 'food/delete.html', {"food_item":food_item})
